node.statement: EXISTS — QPE (phase_estimate in src/library/patterns.jl:136): Sturm.jl already implements quantum phase estimation using controlled-unitary powers and QFT-based readout. HOWEVER, the paper requires QPE applied to a block-encoded operator (not a directly implementable unitary). This requires wrapping the block encoding in Hamiltonian simulation (e^{-iHt}) first, or using the QSVT-based eigenvalue estimation variant (Lemma 26, citing SL21/CGJ19). The existing QPE needs extension to accept block-encoded operators.
